description: Add 3-Tier Device Control layer and 12 Pre-Built Pilot Agents plus Agent Marketplace to the @quant/agent-runtime package. The device control provides tiered hardware interaction (API, OS, Vision). The pilot agents are concrete WorkerAgent implementations for common tasks. The marketplace enables publishing and installing community agents.
steps: Create src/device/tier1-api.ts - Tier1ApiController: direct calls to Quant internal APIs. Methods: callApi(endpoint, params), getAvailableApis(). Instant execution, perfect reliability. Uses typed API definitions.

Create src/device/tier2-os.ts - Tier2OsController: native OS interactions via platform bridges. Methods: executeOsCommand(command), getSystemInfo(), openUrl(url), setClipboard(text). Platform detection (ios/android/desktop).

Create src/device/tier3-vision.ts - Tier3VisionController: screenshot-based AI vision for external apps. Methods: captureAndAnalyze(), findElement(description), getClickCoords(target). Uses @quant/ai for vision inference.

Create src/device/screen-capture.ts - ScreenCapture class: diff-based screen capture for efficient vision. Methods: capture(), getDiff(previous, current), getRegion(bounds). Stores frame buffer for comparison.

Create src/device/action-executor.ts - ActionExecutor class: dispatches physical interactions. Methods: tap(x, y), swipe(from, to, duration), type(text), scroll(direction, amount), longPress(x, y, duration). Each returns ActionResult.

Create src/device/app-launcher.ts - AppLauncher class: opens apps by name using deep links. Methods: launch(appName), launchByDeepLink(uri), getInstalledApps(), isAppRunning(appName). Maintains app registry.
Create src/agents/email-pilot.ts - EmailPilot extends WorkerAgent: email triage, auto-archive spam, draft replies. defaultPermission: ACT_LOW. run() method processes inbox items.
Create src/agents/code-pilot.ts - CodePilot extends WorkerAgent: code review, fix suggestions, auto-commit. defaultPermission: SUGGEST. run() analyzes code changes.
Create src/agents/schedule-pilot.ts - SchedulePilot extends WorkerAgent: calendar management, scheduling. defaultPermission: ACT_LOW. run() manages calendar events.
Create src/agents/shopping-pilot.ts - ShoppingPilot extends WorkerAgent: product research, price comparison. defaultPermission: ACT_HIGH. run() researches products.
Create src/agents/finance-pilot.ts - FinancePilot extends WorkerAgent: expense tracking, financial insights. defaultPermission: OBSERVE. run() analyzes expenses.
Create src/agents/social-pilot.ts - SocialPilot extends WorkerAgent: social media management. defaultPermission: SUGGEST (graduates to ACT_LOW). run() manages social posts.
Create src/agents/content-pilot.ts - ContentPilot extends WorkerAgent: content creation assistance. defaultPermission: SUGGEST. run() generates content drafts.
Create src/agents/travel-pilot.ts - TravelPilot extends WorkerAgent: trip planning, booking. defaultPermission: ACT_HIGH. run() plans trips.
Create src/agents/research-pilot.ts - ResearchPilot extends WorkerAgent: web research, summarization. defaultPermission: ACT_LOW. run() researches topics.
Create src/agents/health-pilot.ts - HealthPilot extends WorkerAgent: health tracking, reminders. defaultPermission: OBSERVE. run() tracks health metrics.
Create src/agents/meeting-pilot.ts - MeetingPilot extends WorkerAgent: meeting prep, notes, follow-ups. defaultPermission: ACT_LOW. run() manages meetings.
Create src/agents/learning-pilot.ts - LearningPilot extends WorkerAgent: learning recommendations, course tracking. defaultPermission: SUGGEST. run() recommends learning resources.
Create src/marketplace/agent-spec.ts - AgentSpec interface and Zod schema for shareable agent definitions: name, version, author, permissions, capabilities, entrypoint, config schema.
Create src/marketplace/publisher.ts - AgentPublisher class: validates and publishes agent specs. Methods: validate(spec), publish(spec), unpublish(agentId), getPublished().
Create src/marketplace/installer.ts - AgentInstaller class: installs community agents (sandbox first). Methods: install(specId), uninstall(agentId), getInstalled(), promoteFromSandbox(agentId).
Update src/index.ts - Add barrel exports for all device controllers, all 12 pilot agents, and marketplace modules.
Create src/__tests__/device/tier1-api.test.ts - Test API calling, available APIs listing.
Create src/__tests__/device/tier2-os.test.ts - Test OS commands, platform detection.
Create src/__tests__/device/tier3-vision.test.ts - Test vision analysis with mocked AI.
Create src/__tests__/device/screen-capture.test.ts - Test capture, diff computation.
Create src/__tests__/device/action-executor.test.ts - Test tap, swipe, type, scroll dispatching.
Create src/__tests__/device/app-launcher.test.ts - Test app launch, deep link resolution.
Create src/__tests__/agents/email-pilot.test.ts - Test email processing: archives spam, drafts replies correctly.
Create src/__tests__/agents/code-pilot.test.ts - Test code review, suggestion generation.
Create src/__tests__/agents/schedule-pilot.test.ts - Test calendar management.
Create src/__tests__/agents/shopping-pilot.test.ts - Test product research with ACT_HIGH permission.
Create src/__tests__/agents/finance-pilot.test.ts - Test expense tracking with OBSERVE permission.
Create src/__tests__/agents/social-pilot.test.ts - Test social management with SUGGEST permission.
Create src/__tests__/agents/content-pilot.test.ts - Test content creation.
Create src/__tests__/agents/travel-pilot.test.ts - Test trip planning with ACT_HIGH permission.
Create src/__tests__/agents/research-pilot.test.ts - Test web research.
Create src/__tests__/agents/health-pilot.test.ts - Test health tracking with OBSERVE.
Create src/__tests__/agents/meeting-pilot.test.ts - Test meeting management.
Create src/__tests__/agents/learning-pilot.test.ts - Test learning recommendations.
Create src/__tests__/marketplace/agent-spec.test.ts - Test spec schema validation.
Create src/__tests__/marketplace/publisher.test.ts - Test publish/unpublish flow.
Create src/__tests__/marketplace/installer.test.ts - Test install with sandbox, promote flow.
acceptance_criteria: All device control files compile with TypeScript strict
All 12 pilot agents extend WorkerAgent correctly with proper defaultPermission
EmailPilot test processes test emails: archives spam, drafts replies
Marketplace spec validation rejects invalid agent definitions
Installer sandboxes new agents before promoting
All tests pass with NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run
findings: All 232 tests pass across 34 test files. TypeScript strict compilation passes. Prettier pre-commit hook formats code on commit. NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for all npm/node commands.
